name: spantail
description: Spantail integration: per-turn agent telemetry hooks, work-logging and reporting skills, and analysis agents.

apiUrl.title: Spantail instance URL
apiUrl.description: Base URL of your Spantail instance, e.g. https://spantail.example.com

agentToken.title: Agent access token
agentToken.description: Write-only ingest credential from Settings > Agents (spantail_aat_...)

apiToken.title: Personal API token
apiToken.description: Optional; personal API token (spantail_pat_...) for the bundled MCP server the skills and agents use. Acts as you (read/write per your permissions), separate from the agent access token above. Leave blank if you only use the telemetry hooks.

sendSessionSummary.title: Send session title as summary
sendSessionSummary.description: ON: when a session ends, its plan file's title — or, without a plan, the session title Claude Code generated (exists only on compacted/resumed sessions) — is sent to Spantail as the entry description (extracted mechanically, no inference; stored verbatim, may appear in reports and share links; /spantail:summary off skips one session). OFF (default): nothing is sent unless you run /spantail:summary on in a session.
